text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black decides not to run in the Satsuki
Sho and simply observes it. There, she witnesses
firsthand Brusquement's overwhelming victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, reporters press Air Groove for
information about Brusquement. Kitasan Black's
confidence is shattered.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the Classic Triple Crown is just getting
started. Sakura Bakushin O gives her some much
needed encouragement, and Kitasan Black is able
to keep pushing forward.
